placeSearch.response: callback(status, result) -> result.poiList.pois[] ; each poi: {id, name, type, location(AMap.LngLat .lng/.lat GCJ-02), address, tel, adname, pname, cityname, rating, cost, website, photos[]}
placeSearch.notes: Strategy=INTERCEPT/browser. Drive www.amap.com (loads JSAPI w/ site's embedded web key), then run AMap.PlaceSearch in page context. extensions:'all' adds rating+adname(district)+cost+website. status 'complete'|'no_data'|'error'. NO user key needed. Raw Node fetch of /service/poiInfo & /service/poiTipsSearchlite HANGS (page-signed) — do NOT replay them. location is an AMap.LngLat OBJECT (.lng/.lat), must extract coords inside page.evaluate (does not serialize back as array).

poiTipsSearchlite_DO_NOT_USE.response: autocomplete tips (fires on type); body not captured by daemon, raw replay hangs (needs page request signing)
poiTipsSearchlite_DO_NOT_USE.notes: Recorded for reference only. Fires naturally when typing into search box. Raw fetch from Node/eval hangs. Use AMap.PlaceSearch instead.
